texto: Maybe that was why it was almost always the underclasses, the women, the people of color, the gay people, the ones who were already stigmatized as being vulnerable, availble, trapped by the body, who took the risk of the wire.
explicacao: Citação de Melissa Scott sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Maybe that was why it was almost always the underclasses, the women, the people of color, the gay…” articula reflexao, cyberpunk, lgbt em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como lgbt.
